info.title: Harmony API
info.description:
REST API for Harmony.

**Rate Limiting:** All endpoints are subject to rate limiting. When the limit is exceeded, the API responds with `429 Too Many Requests` and a `Retry-After` header indicating when the client may retry.

post.summary: Sync (get or create) the authenticated user's profile.
post.description:
Called after Supabase login. Creates a profile row if this is the first login,
or returns the existing one.

# Errors
Returns `ApiError` if the JWT lacks an email claim or the upsert fails.

delete.summary: Soft-delete a message. Only the author can delete (ADR-038).
delete.description:
# Errors
Returns `ApiError` on authorization failure or repository error.

patch.summary: Edit a message's content. Only the author can edit.
patch.description:
# Errors
Returns `ApiError` on validation failure, authorization failure, or repository error.

get.summary: List messages in a channel with cursor-based pagination.
get.description:
Use `before` (ISO 8601) to paginate backward. Default limit is 50, max is 100.

# Errors
Returns `ApiError` if the cursor is invalid or a repository error occurs.

parameters.name: before
parameters.description: ISO 8601 timestamp cursor — fetch messages created before this time.

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Maximum number of messages to return (1-100, default 50).

post.summary: Send a message to a channel.
post.description:
# Errors
Returns `ApiError` on validation failure or repository error.

get.summary: List DM conversations for the authenticated user.
get.description:
Returns DM conversations sorted by most recent activity (message or creation).
Uses cursor-based pagination.

# Errors
Returns `ApiError` if the cursor is invalid or a repository error occurs.

parameters.name: before
parameters.description: ISO 8601 timestamp cursor -- fetch DMs with last activity before this time.

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Maximum number of DMs to return (1-100, default 50).

post.summary: Create a new DM conversation or return an existing one (idempotent).
post.description:
If a DM already exists between the caller and the recipient, returns the
existing conversation with `200 OK`. Otherwise creates a new DM and returns
`201 Created`.

# Errors
Returns `ApiError` on validation failure or repository error.

delete.description:
Removes the authenticated user from the DM server. The conversation data
is preserved for the other participant.

# Errors
Returns `ApiError` on authorization failure or repository error.

403.description: Not a member of this DM

get.summary: Preview an invite by code (no authentication required).
get.description:
Returns the server name and member count so a user can decide whether to join.

# Errors
Returns `ApiError` if the invite is not found or a repository error occurs.

get.summary: Get the authenticated user's own profile.
get.description:
# Errors
Returns `ApiError` if the profile is not found or a repository error occurs.

get.summary: List all servers the authenticated user is a member of.

post.description:
The authenticated user becomes the owner. A default `#general` channel
and server membership are created automatically.

# Errors
Returns `ApiError` on validation failure or repository error.

get.description:
# Errors
Returns `ApiError` if the server is not found or a repository error occurs.

get.summary: List all bans for a server. Requires admin+ role.
get.description:
# Errors
Returns `ApiError` on authorization failure or repository error.

post.summary:
Ban a user from a server and remove their membership.
Requires admin+ role with hierarchy enforcement.
post.description:
# Errors
Returns `ApiError` on authorization failure, conflict, or repository error.

403.description: Insufficient role / hierarchy violation / cannot ban owner

delete.summary: Unban a user from a server. Requires admin+ role.
delete.description:
# Errors
Returns `ApiError` on authorization failure or repository error.

get.summary: List all channels in a server.

post.summary: Create a new channel in a server. Requires admin+ role.
post.description:
# Errors
Returns `ApiError` on validation failure or repository error.

delete.summary: Delete a channel. Requires admin+ role.
delete.description:
# Errors
Returns `ApiError` if this is the last channel or the channel is not found.

patch.summary: Update a channel's name and/or topic. Requires admin+ role.
patch.description:
# Errors
Returns `ApiError` on validation failure or repository error.

post.summary: Create a new invite for a server.
post.description:
The authenticated user must be a member of the server. Returns a shareable
invite code that can be used by others to join.

# Errors
Returns `ApiError` on validation failure, permission denial, or repository error.

get.summary: List all members of a server.

post.summary: Join a server via an invite code.
post.description:
Validates the invite, checks that the user is not already a member,
and adds them to the server.

# Errors
Returns `ApiError` on invalid invite, expired invite, or conflict.

delete.summary: Kick a member from a server. Requires moderator+ role with hierarchy enforcement.
delete.description:
# Errors
Returns `ApiError` on authorization failure or repository error.

patch.summary: Assign a role to a server member. Requires admin+ role with hierarchy enforcement.
patch.description:
# Errors
Returns `ApiError` on validation failure, authorization failure, or repository error.

post.summary: Transfer server ownership. Only the current owner can do this.
post.description:
# Errors
Returns `ApiError` on authorization failure or repository error.

404.description: Server or new owner not found

AssignRoleRequest.description: Request body for assigning a role to a server member.

role.description: The role to assign (admin, moderator, member). Use transfer-ownership for owner.

BanListResponse.description: Envelope for a list of server bans (ADR-036).

BanResponse.description: Server ban response returned to API consumers.

BanUserRequest.description: Request body for banning a user from a server.

CategoryId.description: Unique identifier for a channel category.

ChannelId.description: Unique identifier for a channel within a server.

ChannelListResponse.description: Envelope for a list of channels (ADR-036).

ChannelResponse.description: Channel response returned to API consumers.

CreateChannelRequest.description: Request body for creating a new channel.

CreateDmRequest.description: Request body for creating a new DM conversation.

recipientId.description: The user ID of the recipient.

CreateInviteRequest.description: Request body for creating a new invite.

expiresInHours.description: Invite expires after this many hours. `None` means it never expires.

maxUses.description: Maximum number of times this invite can be used. `None` means unlimited.

CreateServerRequest.description: Request body for creating a new server.

DmLastMessageResponse.description: Last message preview embedded in DM list items.

DmListItem.description: A single DM conversation in the list response.

DmListQuery.description: Query parameters for listing DMs (cursor-based pagination).

before.description: ISO 8601 timestamp cursor -- fetch DMs with last activity before this time.

limit.description: Maximum number of DMs to return (1-100, default 50).

DmListResponse.description: Envelope for a list of DM conversations with cursor pagination (ADR-036).

nextCursor.description: Cursor for the next page. `None` if this is the last page.

DmRecipientResponse.description: Recipient profile embedded in DM responses.

DmResponse.description: Response for a single DM conversation (create or get).

EditMessageRequest.description: Request body for editing a message.

HealthResponse.description: Deep health check response with component status.

latency_ms.description: Time taken for health check in milliseconds

InviteCode.description: Invite code for joining a server.

InvitePreviewResponse.description:
Public invite preview (no auth required).

Contains just enough information for a user to decide whether to join.

InviteResponse.description: Invite response returned to API consumers.

JoinServerRequest.description: Request body for joining a server via invite code.

MemberListResponse.description: Envelope for a list of server members (ADR-036).

MemberResponse.description: Server member response returned to API consumers.

MessageListQuery.description: Query parameters for listing messages (cursor-based pagination).

before.description: ISO 8601 timestamp cursor — fetch messages created before this time.

limit.description: Maximum number of messages to return (1-100, default 50).

MessageListResponse.description: Envelope for a list of messages with cursor pagination (ADR-036).

nextCursor.description: Cursor for the next page. `None` if this is the last page.

MessageResponse.description:
Message response returned to API consumers.

Excludes `deleted_at` — soft-deleted messages are filtered server-side.

ProblemDetails.description:
RFC 9457 Problem Details response.

All API errors are returned in this standardized format.

ProfileResponse.description: Profile response returned to API consumers.

Role.description:
Strongly-typed role enum matching the `server_members.role` TEXT column.

Variants are ordered by authority level (Member < Moderator < Admin < Owner).
`PartialOrd`/`Ord` are manually avoided to prevent accidental comparisons;
use `level()` or `can_moderate()` for hierarchy checks.

SendMessageRequest.description: Request body for sending a new message.

ServerListResponse.description: Envelope for a list of servers (ADR-036).

ServerResponse.description: Server response returned to API consumers.

TransferOwnershipRequest.description: Request body for transferring server ownership.

newOwnerId.description: The user ID of the new owner (must be an existing member).

UpdateChannelRequest.description: Request body for updating an existing channel.

topic.description: New channel topic (if provided; null clears it).

UserId.description: Unique identifier for a user (Supabase auth.users UUID).
